commands.command: uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run pytest tests/uix/test_admin_shell.py tests/uix/test_resource_views_states.py tests/uix/test_resource_views_contract.py

commands.result: passed with existing Vite large chunk warning

covered_behavior: Tenant JWKS publication view shows tenant issuer and tenant jwks_uri.
Active, next, and retired key rows are grouped by lifecycle.
Public runtime JWKS keys are marked public while retired inventory keys remain non-public.
Cross-tenant and unscoped retired inventory rows are excluded.
Sensitive private key material is not serialized into the UIX publication view.
Admin UI exposes the Tenant JWKS tab and builds successfully.
